titleStmt.title: SII 22.394: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 394. (A.R. No. 394 of 1906) TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT, PUDUKKOTTAI STATE, TIRUMAYYAM. SATYAGIRINĀTHA-PERUMĀḶ TEMPLE—ON THE WEST WALL OF THE MAṆḌAPA.

summary.p: This is dated in Śaka 1591, Saumya, Tai 5 (A.D. 1669). It records a sale of land at Malukkaṉpākkam out of the tiruviḷaiyāṭṭam belonging to god Tiruppadi Aḻagiyameyyar at Tirumeyyam, together with a house in the street by the side of the Veṅgaikkuḷam tank, for 300 paṇam (called Tirugōkarṉam Miṉṉal), to a certain Śōlaiyappa-Piḷḷai Gaṅgaiyāḍi of Vānavīraṉ of Madurai, who seems to have been an agent appointed by Raghunātha-Narēndra for the conduct of the early morning service in the temple instituted by the chief for his own merit. A separate piece of land at Malukkaṉ-vayal is also mentioned as having been assigned to one Vīrarāghava-Piḷḷai for management.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svastiśrī . cakāttam 1000 5 100 9 10 1 Itaṉmel cellāniṉṟa cavumiya varuṣam tai mātam 5 tiyati tirumalai tiruppati nayiṉār tirumeyyamalaiyāḷar kovil śrīpaṇṭārattuk kāriyattukaṭavārum Amalattārum vārarumom vāna viraṉ maturaiyil
Irukkum colaiyappa piḷḷai keṅkaiyāṭiyā piḷḷaikku Ikkoyil ttiruviḷai yāṭṭamāna malukkaṉpākkam kiṟayampaṇṇi kiṟayacātaṉaṅ kuṭuttapaṭi Itta maluk kaṉ vayalil teṉmeṟkāka virarākava piḷḷaikku niṟuvāka Ilekka
cceruvai pattu mā nilamum Itaṉ kiḻakku keṅkaiyāṭiyāpiḷḷaikku niruvāka Ilekkacceruvai pattumā nilamum pokam tuṇṭāka malukkaṉvayalu perun tevimaṅkala vayalukku vaṭakku tevimaṅkalam Ilaṅkuṭi vayalukku
kkiḻakku veḷḷāttukkun ttuṟaikkut teṟku Āṭṭāṅkuṭi vaḻip pilattukku meṟku Iṉṉāṉkellaikkuḷ paṭṭa Entalp puṟavaṭai nañcai puñcai māvaṭai
maravaṭai kiḻnokkiya kiṇaṟu melnokkiya maramum niti niccepa cala pāṣāṇa mutaliya cakala camutāyattuṭaṉum kūṭina malukkaṉvayalukku vilaippiramāṇamāka niccittuk kiraya tirukkokarṉam miṉṉal ḷa 3 100
Intap paṇam muṉṉūṟu morukiḻipaṭa nāṅkaḷ pattikkoṇṭapaṭiyiṉāle tām cantirātittavarai cantatippiṟavecam rakunāta narentiraṉukkup puṇṇiyamāka tiruppati Aḻakiya meyyarukku Utayakālattil rakunātar
vacca kayaḷai naṭattikkoṇṭu tammuṭa niṟuvākattukku tan kaṭṭaḷaiyāka kovilile mūṉu paṭi cātamu malaipperumāḷ viṭṭukkut teṟku veṅkaik kuḷakkarai ttiru vitikku vaṭakkāka maṉaiyum pattikkoṇṭu cukattile
yirukkakkaṭavarākavum Inta taṉmattukku yātāmoruvanākilum Akitam paṇṇinaper keṅkaikkaraiil kārāmpacuvaik koṉṉa toṣattilum mātāpitāvaik koṉṉa toṣattilum
pokakkaṭavarākavum
Digital edition of SII 22.394 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
